channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 54/100 (building)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 54/100 (building). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title: BBC Politics: Streeting suggests NI cut and North Sea drilling
item.description: Streeting suggests NI cut and North Sea drilling

item.title: BBC Politics: Sturgeon tells BBC: I'm serving a sentence for crime I didn't commit
item.description: Sturgeon tells BBC: I'm serving a sentence for crime I didn't commit

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘Labour have lost their way’: voters in Makerfield say it’s time for a change
item.description: ‘Labour have lost their way’: voters in Makerfield say it’s time for a change

item.title: BBC Politics: Watch: Key moments from Nicola Sturgeon's interview with Laura Kuenssberg
item.description: Watch: Key moments from Nicola Sturgeon's interview with Laura Kuenssberg

item.title: i Politics: Streeting's plan to review national insurance will lead to cuts, minister warns
item.description: Streeting's plan to review national insurance will lead to cuts, minister warns

item.title: LabourList: 'The filthy, the rich, the ex-Lord and the ex-PM'
item.description: 'The filthy, the rich, the ex-Lord and the ex-PM'

item.title: Reuters: UK foreign minister due to visit China and India to discuss global issues - Reuters
item.description: UK foreign minister due to visit China and India to discuss global issues - Reuters

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer hires ex-M&S chief to tackle youth unemployment crisis
item.description: Starmer hires ex-M&S chief to tackle youth unemployment crisis

item.title: The Times: Tony Blair told Starmer to fight on, then attacked him for lacking a plan - The Times
item.description: Tony Blair told Starmer to fight on, then attacked him for lacking a plan - The Times

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Quite something for someone who's party is so bereft of talent that Chris Philp and Richard Holden are two of the better known members of the shadow cabinet.
item.description: Quite something for someone who's party is so bereft of talent that Chris Philp and Richard Holden are two of the better known members of the shadow cabinet.
